headline: Block Auto-Enables Bitcoin Payments For U.S. Businesses

headline: Jack Dorsey's Square Automatically Enables Bitcoin Payments for Millions of Sellers
summary: Block-owned payment processor Square has shifted Bitcoin acceptance from opt-in to opt-out for eligible sellers.

raw.headline: Jack Dorsey's Square Automatically Enables Bitcoin Payments for Millions of Sellers

headline: Block Square Wins Multi Location Hospitality Clients And Expands Franchise Reach
summary: Block's Square platform has secured new multi-location clients in the US and Australia, including Steak Escape and The Pancake Parlour. These wins highlight Square's unified commerce and franchise management tools being adopted by larger, more complex hospitality and quick-service brands. The Steak Escape rollout includes drive-thru operations in the US, while The Pancake Parlour reflects Square's reach into established Australian hospitality chains. For investors tracking Block (NYSE:XYZ),...

headline: Is Block (SQ) Now An Opportunity After A 75% Five Year Share Price Slide?
summary: For investors wondering whether Block is attractively priced after a choppy few years, or whether the stock still carries more risk than reward, this article breaks down what the current share price reflects. With Block closing at US$55.98 and returns of 3.0% over 1 year, but declines of 8.5% over 7 days, 12.1% over 30 days, 14.1% year to date, and 17.5% over 3 years, the stock has provided a mixed experience for investors that raises fresh questions about value. Recent coverage has focused...
